codeReview.summary: The auth/identity review doc satisfies VAL-AUTH-001 and VAL-AUTH-002. It traces the login, refresh, logout, profile, password-reset, admin-reset, MFA, disabled-user, and lockout flows end-to-end and records security, privacy, protocol, and token/session findings with concrete evidence.

summary: PASS. The auth/identity review provides the required full-stack narrative and evidence-backed findings, and scrutiny did not identify any defects in the review artifact itself.
